uiBuilder.label: Extraction Summary Card
uiBuilder.description: A custom version/extraction summary: a version dropdown plus a green summary card (name, CURRENT badge, created/triggered-by, document & field stats, low-confidence warning). Driven by a JSON array; the dropdown switches the displayed version.

properties.name: versions
properties.label: Versions (JSON array)
properties.description: Array of version objects. Each item: { id, label, name, current, created, triggeredBy, documents, totalFields, newFields, modified, lowConfidence }. Bind a data resource here.

properties.name: selectedId
properties.label: Selected version id
properties.description: Which version's id is shown. Empty shows the first item. Updated automatically when the dropdown changes.

properties.name: versionLabel
properties.label: Picker label
properties.description: Small label shown above the dropdown.

properties.name: button1Label
properties.label: Button 1 label
properties.description: Left action button (has a clock icon).

actions.name: VERSION_CHANGED
actions.label: Version changed
actions.description: Fired when the dropdown selection changes. Payload: { id }.

payload.name: id
payload.label: Version id
payload.description: Id of the newly selected version.

actions.name: VIEW_TIMELINE_CLICKED
actions.label: View timeline clicked
actions.description: Fired when the View timeline button is clicked. Payload: { id }.

actions.name: PROCEED_TO_AUDIT_CLICKED
actions.label: Proceed to audit clicked
actions.description: Fired when the Proceed to audit button is clicked. Payload: { id }.
